saintapediadrilldown-show-filters: Label for the mobile button that reveals the filter sidebar. Shown when the sidebar is currently hidden.
saintapediadrilldown-hide-filters: Label for the mobile button that hides the filter sidebar. Shown when the sidebar is currently visible.
saintapediadrilldown-clear-filters: Link label that removes all active filters at once. Appears in the active-filter chips bar when two or more filters are applied.
saintapediadrilldown-remove-filter: Tooltip and aria-label on the × button inside each active-filter chip. The chip also shows the filter name and value.
saintapediadrilldown-active-filters: Accessible name (aria-label) for the active-filter chips bar. Used as a landmark region label for screen readers.
saintapediadrilldown-chip-text: Display text inside each active-filter chip. $1 is the filter name (e.g. "Category"), $2 is the selected value (e.g. "Martyrs"). Translators may reorder or repunctuate.
saintapediadrilldown-remove-filter-aria: Accessible label on the remove (×) button inside each active-filter chip. $1 is the filter name, $2 is the selected value.
saintapediadrilldown-search-filter-label: Label suffix for text-search filter chips. $1 is the field name (e.g. "Name"). Displayed as the chip label when a full-text search param is active.
saintapediadrilldown-range-value: Display value for a date- or number-range filter chip. $1 is the lower bound, $2 is the upper bound (e.g. "2020 → 2021"). Translators may change the separator.
